title: Almost Pure Vanilla
description: This mod-pack is best suited for  Vanilla Minecraft players who want a slight enhance in their gameplay. It does not add any new blocks or biomes but adds a many quality of life mods which will make your gaming experience chill and enjoyable.
body: This mod-pack is best suited for  Vanilla Minecraft players who want a slight enhance in their gameplay. It does not add any new blocks or biomes, but adds a many quality of life mods, like Jade, Falling Tree, and Armor HUD, which will make your gaming experience chill and enjoyable. I added a new structure-generating mod called Dungeons and Taverns, as well as pretty much EVERY optimization mod available for the most recent MC versions. This modpack is light and efficient, so even if your PC's a potato, it should be able to run this modpack. Another great feature is the ability to use a popular mod called Voxy efficiently with shaderpacks, because I hand selected the best ones that look amazing and are compatible with Voxy.
